configuration.title: LLM Translate
configuration.provider.description: LLM API provider mode. Auto tries to infer the request and response shape from the endpoint.
configuration.endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint for the remote or local LLM service, such as an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions URL or Ollama /api/chat URL.
configuration.model.description: Model name sent to the LLM service.
configuration.defaultTargetLanguage.desc: Default target language used by the editor title button when a dropdown menu is not available.
configuration.authMode.description: Authentication strategy for the configured LLM endpoint.
configuration.authToken.description: Token value used when authMode is bearer. Prefer storing secrets in user settings.
configuration.authHeaderName.description: Header name used when authMode is header.
configuration.authHeaderValue.descriptio: Header value used when authMode is header. Prefer storing secrets in user settings.
configuration.cacheRoot.description: Root folder used to store md5 cache files and translated outputs. A per-user subfolder is created automatically.
configuration.requestTimeoutMs.descripti: Request timeout in milliseconds for a single translation call.
configuration.temperature.description: Sampling temperature sent to the LLM API.
